context.summary: Stale frontend version strings updated to v2.2.3. nginx.conf /health was returning 2.1.0. HTML nav-version fallbacks were 2.2.2. JS version fetch was pulling from backend (2.2.2) instead of frontend health.
context.root_cause: Version strings were not updated during HL-MS3-FIX-002 sprint; JS fetched version from backend URL, masking frontend version.
risk_areas: auth.js version fetch URL changed from backend to /health — verify nav badge still populates on all pages
login.html version fetch URL changed — verify login page shows correct version

tests.title: Backend /health still returns v2.2.2
tests.expected: version field is "2.2.2" — backend not touched

tests.title: Login page shows v2.2.3
tests.description: Open https://harmonylab.rentyourcio.com/login.html. Look for the version label at the bottom of the login card.

tests.title: Login page version badge updates dynamically
tests.description: Open login page with DevTools Network tab open. Observe the fetch to /health completing.
tests.expected: Fetch to /health succeeds (200) and version badge shows v2.2.3 after JS runs

tests.title: Song list page nav shows v2.2.3
tests.description: Sign in and open https://harmonylab.rentyourcio.com/index.html. Check top-right nav version badge.

tests.title: Song view page nav shows v2.2.3
tests.description: Open any song (e.g., Autumn Leaves). Check top-right nav version badge.

tests.title: Quiz page nav shows v2.2.3
tests.description: Open https://harmonylab.rentyourcio.com/quiz.html. Check top-right nav version badge.

tests.title: Progress page nav shows v2.2.3
tests.description: Open https://harmonylab.rentyourcio.com/progress.html. Check top-right nav version badge.

tests.title: Song list loads
tests.description: Sign in and open https://harmonylab.rentyourcio.com/index.html. Song list should load.

tests.title: Song view loads chord analysis
tests.description: Click Autumn Leaves from the song list.
tests.expected: Chord progression, key centers, and Roman numerals display correctly

tests.title: Transpose dropdown works
tests.description: In Autumn Leaves song view, use the key center transpose dropdown.
tests.expected: Chords and Roman numerals update to reflect transposed key. No errors.

tests.title: CORS not broken
tests.description: Sign in to harmonylab.rentyourcio.com. Load a song. Open DevTools Console.
tests.expected: No CORS errors in console. API calls succeed.

test_data_notes: Use any existing song (e.g., Autumn Leaves, song 34). Authentication via Google OAuth required for pages beyond login.
cc_observations: The CI/CD workflow deploys the backend only — frontend was deployed manually from frontend/ subdirectory. The version fetch in auth.js was changed from backend URL to /health (frontend). This is semantically correct but is a behavior change — nav badges now show frontend version instead of backend version.
